name: Pennsylvania Dutch Tomatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the tomatoes into thick slices.
2. Dip the tomato slices in a mixture of flour, salt, and pepper.
3. Sprinkle half of the brown sugar over the seasoned tomato slices.
4. Heat the butter in a large skillet.
5. Add the tomato slices to the skillet and cook slowly.
6. Turn the tomato slices once and sprinkle them with the remaining brown sugar.
7. Cook until the tomatoes are tender.
8. Pour the heavy cream over the tomatoes and continue cooking until it bubbles.
